rationale: Educ. Code §29.152 governs kindergarten scheduling options and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A public school kindergarten may be operated on a half-day or a full-day basis at the option of the board of trustees of the school district.
_note: Rule text concerns kindergarten operation; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
